ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population_total" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Geographic area size in square kilometers */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., city, district, province) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Dur, Semi dur, Banco) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_proportions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of population distribution */,
  "rural_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the population living in rural areas */,
  "urban_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the population living in urban areas */,
  "total_proportion" REAL /* Total proportion of the population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data pertains to */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_proportions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_proportions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_proportions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being accessed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or link to the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* How often the data source is updated (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region related to the data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category related to the data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source related to the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend analysis, comparative analysis) */,
  "tools_used" TEXT /* Tools or software used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
